title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Sloeberries
description: A simple yet flavorful recipe featuring pan-seared Norwegian salmon paired with the sweetness of sloeberries. This dish is perfect for a light dinner.

ingredients.name: Sloeberries
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, depending on season

instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the fat in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the sloeberries with a splash of water in a separate pan.
Bring the sloeberry mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook until the berries have broken down and the mixture has thickened.
To serve, place a salmon fillet on each plate and top with a spoonful of the sloeberry sauce.
Garnish with fresh herbs and serve immediately.
